title: Vais — Extension Handlers
description: Per-handler latency, throughput, error and skip rates for all registered Vais extension handlers. Metrics are emitted by ExtensionInvocationInstrumentation via vais_extension_handler_invoke_duration_seconds and vais_extension_handler_invoke_total.

panels.title: Handler p95 Latency
panels.description: 95th-percentile invocation duration per handler. For container extensions this includes the HTTP round-trip to the extension container. Spikes indicate slow container response or network congestion.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, extension, handler, seam) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_duration_seconds_bucket{extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m])))
histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, extension, handler, seam) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_duration_seconds_bucket{extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m])))

panels.title: Invocations per Minute
panels.description: Handler invocation throughput. Drops indicate scope changes or extension removal. Unexpected spikes may indicate retry loops.

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Rate of invocations that ended with action=fail. For failureMode=fail extensions this means the agent turn was aborted. High error rates here warrant investigation of the extension container logs.

targets.expr: sum by (extension, handler) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_total{action="fail",extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m])) / sum by (extension, handler) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_total{extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m]))

panels.title: Skip Rate
panels.description: Rate of invocations that ended with action=skip (failureMode=skip on an erroring handler). A rising skip rate means the handler is failing silently. Safe only for best-effort decorators.

targets.expr: sum by (extension, handler) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_total{action="skip",extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m])) / sum by (extension, handler) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_total{extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m]))

panels.title: Top-5 Slowest Handlers (p95)
panels.description: Handlers ranked by p95 latency in the current time window. Use to identify which extensions most affect per-turn overhead. For container extensions, latency > 100 ms warrants a --accept-latency-cost review.

targets.expr: topk(5, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, extension, handler, seam, host) (rate(vais_extension_handler_invoke_duration_seconds_bucket{extension=~"$extension",seam=~"$seam",host=~"$host"}[5m]))))
